programmes.show_description: A teenager demands cash, not school supplies and clothes, for babysitting children. Mothers dispute damages after a child falls headfirst into an illegally parked car. S10, Ep195
A woman sues her estranged son for unpaid rent after his girlfriend files a restraining order against her. S10, Ep196
An artist claims he was kicked out of 'his' gallery space after he had just finished renovating it; the property owner says the artist damaged his building. S23, Ep159
A couple tries to shield their granddaughter from a half-naked man who is high on meth and allegedly running wild in their neighbourhood. S23, Ep160
A home renovation and the death of a woman's husband come into play when she gives her cat to a foster family. S23, Ep161
Two formerly engaged women fight over the alleged mistreatment of cats and carpet when their relationship falls apart. S23, Ep162
A man spends a night in prison after his roommates call the police on him; he sues them for the return of his property. S23, Ep163
A man allegedly suffering from PTSD after being shot in prison collects state disability but lets it slip that he makes money on the side as a nanny. S23, Ep164
A father and daughter go after their neighbour for a 911-call alleging mental instability, trespassing and a police report. S23, Ep165
Broken porcelain dolls, credit card fraud and alleged child abuse bring two women, who share the same ex-husband, to court. S10, Ep190
A woman alleges that the father of her newborn owes her for bailing him out of jail and for damages to her car. S10, Ep192
The discovery of vital evidence helps detectives piece together the case. S9, Ep3
A woman vanishes without a trace. But, twenty years on, a clump of hair and a dedicated team of scientists uncover the victim's body. S9, Ep4
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
The bodies of two women are found in the ashes of a deliberate apartment fire. Evidence found in the debris leads investigators to their suspect. S8, Ep29
Two men telephoned 911 to report a woman murdered; neither knew the other had called. The victim's ex-husband was a gun collector, so police had three viable suspects. S8, Ep30
The body of a businessman was found in his rental car. When the victim's wife filed a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators sought the help of a forensic anthropologist. S8, Ep31
When a pipe bomb ripped through a home killing a man and injuring his mother, police needed to quickly determine who sent the bomb, and why. S8, Ep32
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
After a man was murdered, fingerprints and surveillance video helped investigators apprehend the killer within twelve hours. S8, Ep33
When Bruce Miller was shot dead, the crime scene was almost pristine, but when experts examine the victim's wife's computer, they found the evidence he needed to make a conviction. S8, Ep34
A father dreams his daughter has been killed, then she disappears - what does her boyfriend know, and could the dad's nightmare have been an omen? S30, Ep8
Correspondent Erin Moriarty tracks down the accused killer of a decorated military pilot in Brazil - will the United States get her sent back to face a jury? S30, Ep9
A retired UPS driver reveals new details about cult leader David Koresh and what led up to the deadly standoff with law enforcement nearly 25 years ago. S30, Ep10
Helen Torbet visited the Highlands every year, but over the years the son of its proprietors - Don MacMillan Junior - had developed an unhealthy obsession with her. S8, Ep2
In the US, Rebecca Fenton murdered her husband and staged a break-in. Her calm, image-obsessed behaviour masked a chilling psychology. She was sentenced to life in 2015. S1, Ep8
James Ray III, a US lawyer with a secret past, kills his partner Angela after an abusive relationship. He flees, is caught, but dies in jail before sentencing. S1, Ep9
A woman is assaulted a week before her wedding while trying to help an injured man; he denies throwing a chair at her. S10, Ep162
Co-workers become gambling buddies and then roommates, but split over alleged vandalism and money loaned. S10, Ep164
A woman claims she was not aware of her boyfriend's questionable past when she loaned him money. Teenagers and their parents dispute an alleged theft. S10, Ep163
A woman claims a dishonest hotel worker stole her cash and then charged her friend's credit card for her room. S10, Ep165
A woman claims her ex-boyfriend destroyed her property and committed fraud; he says she damaged his prized racing engine. S10, Ep166
A woman cares for her homeless niece but is later accused of stealing money from her. S10, Ep167
A man sues his ex-fiancee for the return of her engagement ring; she claims that he owes her for dental bills. S10, Ep168
A woman alleges her mechanic's son took a joy ride in her van and wrecked it. A woman insists an ex-friend begged her to go on vacation and that she owes her nothing. S10, Ep169
A man suffers multiple stab wounds to the head and face as his tires are slashed when a couple allegedly gang up on him over money. S23, Ep131
A woman claims her actions were justified when she shot a neighbour's dog twice after it ran onto her property. S10, Ep170
An award-winning equine writer denies awareness of a horse slaughter operation in Mexico and sues for alleged bullying on an animal rights blog. S23, Ep132
A man claims his eight-year-old son needs a therapy dog, but his pet sitter says it's just a way for him to have a dog in a 'no pets' building. S23, Ep133
A neighbour is accused of invading a family's privacy as a result of pointing surveillance cameras into their backyard; he claims he had good reason. S23, Ep134
A woman takes in a friend and her children only to discover that she allegedly has alcohol and drug issues; she sues her for stealing her car. S23, Ep135
A woman's 26-year-old car fuels a feud between her son and daughter, as she tries to recover in a nursing home. S23, Ep136
The Judge is incredulous that a man would consider buying annual passes to Disneyland when he owes so much in support. S23, Ep137
At a tire-burnout party to reveal a baby's gender, embarrassing photos of the teen mother-to-be are posted by her mother on Facebook. S23, Ep138
While on a cross-country vacation, a man and his wife discover that staying in a 5.8 million-dollar home is not all it's cracked up to be. S23, Ep139
After being scammed out of thousands in a car sale, a young woman sues a man she has never seen before; he claims the same thing happened to him. S23, Ep140
James Ray III, a US lawyer with a secret past, kills his partner Angela after an abusive relationship. He flees, is caught, but dies in jail before sentencing. S1, Ep9
At the end of a murder mystery event, a real death occurs. S6, Ep12
A Texas love triangle turns deadly, and a man's second wife is charged with the murder of his first. S18, Ep1
Whilst out riding with her husband, a woman dies in an apparent riding accident. S6, Ep13
The 4th July weekend in 2003 was supposed to be a time of celebration for the Harpers of Bakersfield, CA. But, the joyous atmosphere quickly turned to tragedy. S18, Ep4
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another wounded. When experts compare soil from the crime scene with soil found in a suspect's car, they find all the evidence they need. S8, Ep35
When a teenage girl is found dead, her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He confesses to the murder, but so does another man. Experts must determine who is telling the truth. S8, Ep36
When a teacher disappears, his wife receives letters saying that he needed a clean break. Investigators suspect foul play, but without a body, the case would be difficult to prove. S8, Ep37
A teenager is killed by her parents. They claim it was in self-defence, but forensic evidence indicates otherwise. Definite proof comes from an unlikely source. S8, Ep38
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A computer crash pushes a company to the brink of collapse, jeopardising hundreds of jobs. Was it a result of a computer defect, human error, or sabotage? S8, Ep39
A car carrying three secret service agents collided with a car driven by a local deputy. They were killed instantly. The investigation leads to two very different conclusions. S8, Ep40
Ambition, greed and gunshots at a Napa Valley winery - how did a bag with $800,000 in cash lead to murder in a vineyard? S30, Ep11
Nearly four decades after the death of Hollywood star Natalie Wood, investigators reveal new clues, new witnesses and a shocking revelation. S30, Ep12
When Carole Packman disappeared, her husband managed to convince police that she had walked out - a decade later, detectives piece together what really happened. S8, Ep4
Percy Mapleton identified bond trader Isaac Gold as his target to make a fortune. But, a robbery on a moving train turned into tragedy. S8, Ep8
Nasen Saadi stabbed two women at Bournemouth beach in 2024, killing one. Caught via CCTV and bank records, he denied guilt but was convicted for revenge-driven violence. S1, Ep10
When Anthony Ashley-Cooper disappeared in 2005, his family feared that he had been kidnapped, but evidence confirmed that he had been murdered for his money. S1, Ep1
A motorcycle mechanic claims his ex-lover stole his tools and had him falsely arrested. S10, Ep172
A teenager claims a man tasered by police for disorderly conduct fell headfirst into his car and damaged the bumper. S10, Ep173
Family drama intensifies when a man is accused of assaulting his estranged wife's ex-husband. S10, Ep175
A woman demands payment for taking care of her god-daughter and is accused of filing false charges of abuse and neglect. S10, Ep174
Ex-friends sue each other for damages from car vandalism and a bloody assault. S10, Ep171
An angry father claims his son spent 6 months in jail after a 12-year-old falsely accused him of assault and battery. S10, Ep176
A woman blames her ex-boyfriend for dog pound fees, stolen wine and damages to the basement he rented from her. S10, Ep177
Divorced parents fight over child custody and the alleged child abduction of their son. S10, Ep178
Neighbours fight over the collateral damage caused by a fight between their dogs, one of whom allegedly requires cosmetic dental surgery. S23, Ep141
Two women get into a physical altercation over a fight their children had; a 7-year-old testifies that his mother encouraged him to beat up other children. S10, Ep179
After losing an election, a couple accuse the winning union members of sending out 800 defamatory flyers to voters S23, Ep142
A college junior is caught red-handed when a misspelled word in a text matches the same word keyed onto a car. S23, Ep143
When a child is arrested for an assault at school, his parents fight over the cost of attorney fees. S23, Ep144
A contractor tries to lend a helping hand by hiring struggling workers; he is sued by his boss when items from the job site allegedly start to go missing. S23, Ep145
A man claims his daughter was punched in the face repeatedly by his live-in lover's ten-year-old son; she denies all claims. S23, Ep146
